# SERNET Financial Services

> SERNET Financial Services Pvt Ltd — NextGen Financial Service Network. 35+ years of trusted wealth management across 54 cities and 18 countries.

## About

SERNET Financial Services is a trusted wealth management company founded in 1989. We offer comprehensive financial solutions including stock trading, mutual fund investments, insurance, estate planning, credit counselling, and financial education. Operating across 54 cities in 18 countries, we serve retail individuals, HNW families, NRIs, and institutional clients with personalised financial planning.

## Products & Services

- **Trading**: Stock, commodity, and currency trading via Choice FinX platform
- **Mutual Funds**: Direct and regular mutual fund investments via TickFunds
- **Insurance**: Life, health, general, and motor insurance advisory
- **Financial Education**: Investor awareness and literacy programs via Findemy
- **Estate Planning**: Will drafting, succession planning, and trust advisory
- **Credit Counselling**: Debt management and credit repair services

## Platforms

- [Choice FinX](https://choiceindia.com) — Trading and Demat account platform
- [TickFunds](https://sernet-web.skylattice.tech) — Mutual fund investment platform
- [Findemy](https://sernetindia.com/services?tab=education) — Financial education portal

## Key Information

- **Founded**: 1989
- **Headquarters**: India
- **Registration**: AMFI Registered Mutual Fund Distributor (ARN-22198)
- **Client Retention**: 94.5%
- **Website**: https://sernetindia.com

## Contact

- **Website**: https://sernetindia.com/contact
